selectBranch: Please select a branch before submitting the order.
addItems: Please add at least one item to the order
mixedRetailServices: Orders cannot mix retail items and service items. Please add only one type per order.
retailPayOnCollection: Retail orders must be paid at POS. Please select Cash or Card.
failedToCalculateReadyBy: Failed to calculate ready-by date. Please try again.
invalidCustomer: Invalid customer selected. Please select a customer again.
invalidProductIds: Some products have invalid IDs. Please refresh the page and try again.
invalidBranchId: Invalid branch selected. Wrong branchId: "{branchId}". Please choose a branch again.
posSessionBranchConflict: You already have an active POS session in another branch. Close it before creating orders in this branch.
posSessionEnsureFailed: Could not start your POS session. Please try again.
posSessionOpenNotFound: Your POS session is no longer open. Start a new POS session and try again.
posSessionTerminalBranchMismatch: The selected payment terminal belongs to another branch.
failedToLoadCategories: Failed to load categories. Please refresh the page.
failedToLoadProducts: Failed to load products. Please try selecting a different category.
productsForbidden: You don't have permission to view products. Contact your administrator.
failedToLoadData: Failed to load data. Please refresh the page.
permissionDenied: Jh001 You don't have permission to create orders. Please contact your administrator to grant you the "{permission}" permission.
networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
timeoutError: Request timed out. Please try again.
serverError: A server error occurred. Please try again later or contact support if the problem persists.
